SessionStart.description: Load instincts and validate artifacts directory on session start

hooks.command: mkdir -p artifacts/requirements artifacts/contracts artifacts/plans artifacts/tests artifacts/code artifacts/reports && echo 'SuperJeff artifacts directory ready'

PreToolUse.description: Block git --no-verify bypass of pre-commit hooks

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\-\-no-verify'; then echo 'BLOCKED: --no-verify is not allowed. Fix the underlying issue instead.' && exit 1; fi

PreToolUse.description: Block force push to main or master branch

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git push.*--force.*(main|master)|git push.*-f.*(main|master)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Force push to main/master is not allowed.' && exit 1; fi

PreToolUse.description: Warn when writing eval() or exec() into Python files

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'eval\(|exec\('; then echo 'WARNING: eval/exec detected in generated code. Security review required.'; fi

PreToolUse.description: Warn when writing hardcoded secrets into Python files

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE 'secret_key\s*=\s*["\x27][A-Za-z0-9]|password\s*=\s*["\x27][A-Za-z0-9]|api_key\s*=\s*["\x27][A-Za-z0-9]'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Hardcoded secret detected. Use environment variables.' && exit 1; fi

PostToolUse.description: Validate JSON files written to artifacts/ against their schemas

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT_PATH" | grep -q 'artifacts/'; then python -m json.tool "$CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT_PATH" > /dev/null 2>&1 || echo "WARNING: Invalid JSON written to $CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT_PATH"; fi

Stop.description: Persist pipeline state on session end

hooks.command: if [ -f artifacts/pipeline_state.json ]; then cp artifacts/pipeline_state.json artifacts/pipeline_state.$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).bak; fi
